nasb.text: So Achan answered Joshua and said, “Truly, I have sinned against the Lord, the God of Israel, and this is what I did:

esv.text: And Achan answered Joshua, “Truly I have sinned against the Lord God of Israel, and this is what I did:

cnv.text: 亞干回答約書亞，說：“我實在得罪了耶和華以色列的　神；我作過的事是這樣的。

ccb.text: 亚干答道：“我的确得罪了以色列的上帝耶和华。事情是这样的，
